assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to verify current cluster state, check cluster health, node status, and system pods

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 3 includes the exact command 'gcloud container get-server-config' to check available master versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: No API deprecation check command is provided. This is a critical pre-upgrade step that should include checking for deprecated APIs that may break in the new version

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 6 provides the exact command with both --master flag and --cluster-version=1.33 parameters

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 7 includes verification command with expected output format showing '1.33.x-gke.xxxx'

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 8 and 11 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools, though no skip-level upgrade is mentioned (which is acceptable as direct 1.32→1.33 is single level)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 9 and 12 include 'watch' commands to monitor node status and pod rescheduling during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows sequential upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane, and node pools follow the same version (which is standard practice)

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation commands checking node versions, system pods, application health, and cluster info

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes a rollback procedure section explaining limitations (control plane can't be rolled back) and provides commands for node pool recreation if needed
